title: SkillBank
description: The skill bank stores accumulated reusable knowledge as versioned skill entries.

skill_entry_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: skl-{12 hex chars from uuid4}.

title.description: Human-readable one-line summary of the skill.

content.description: Skill content as markdown bullet points. Each bullet is a reusable guideline.

version.description: Semantic version. Patch increments on each update (0.1.0 -> 0.1.1).

task_signature.description: Normalized task type identifier for retrieval matching.

source_experience_ids.description: IDs of experience records that contributed to this skill.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last update. Must end with Z.
